modmenu.description.better-bats: Overhauls bats with flocking, guano production, and ecological niche behaviors.
gamerule.better-bats.bat_swarm_size.desc: Controls the maximum size of bat flocks. When this threshold is met or exceeded, bats will no longer recruit new members into their murmuration. Set to 0 to disable flocking entirely. Default: 5.
gamerule.better-bats.bat_guano_threshold: Determines the time interval in game ticks required for a resting (roosting) bat to produce a fertilizer drop. Once this duration is accumulated, the bat drops guano to fertilize the soil block directly below it. Set to a higher value for slower rates. Default: 12000.
gamerule.better-bats.bat_pest_control.de: Enables or disables predatory combat behaviors in bats. When true, bats will aggressively dive-bomb, target, and instantly defeat nearby crawling pests such as Silverfish and Endermites. Default: true.
gamerule.better-bats.bat_alignment.descr: The steering weight (scale factor) that dictates how strongly individual bats match the velocity and flight heading of nearby flock members. Higher values lead to strict parallel movements, while lower values allow more independent flight paths. Range: 0 to 100. Default: 5.
gamerule.better-bats.bat_cohesion.descri: The steering weight (scale factor) that determines how strongly bats are drawn toward the center of mass of their flock. Higher values keep the swarm tightly packed together, while lower values let the flock spread out. Range: 0 to 100. Default: 5.
gamerule.better-bats.bat_separation.desc: The steering weight (scale factor) that controls how aggressively bats avoid collision and push away from neighboring flock members. Higher values enforce wider personal space buffers, preventing overlapping models. Range: 0 to 100. Default: 10.
gamerule.better-bats.bat_spawn_weight.de: Controls the spawn weight of bats in ambient spawn settings (Vanilla is 10). Set to 0 to disable spawning entirely. Default: 30.
